'''Razi Khan''' was a member of an ancient order of [[The Force/Legends|Force]]-using [[Assassin/Legends|assassins]], the [[Seyugi Dervish]]es.

As a way to preserve their cult from being destroyed by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], several of its members, including Khan, were frozen in [[Carbonite/Legends|carbonite]] underneath their hidden base on [[Recopia]].

Many [[Standard year/Legends|years]] later, they were accidentally revived by one of the monks of [[Mallif Cove]]. Khan [[Death/Legends|killed]] the monk and tried to reach the island-chain [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Scapio]] in an effort to locate someone who could open the Seyugi vaults beneath the fortress. He kidnapped a [[Slicer/Legends|slicer]], but was caught, forcing the Seyugi to go into hiding once again.

Khan was a tall figure with dark eyes, and completely devoid of body hair. He always dressed in a red cloak, and when fighting he wore a white mask with a stylized [[Rancor/Legends|rancor]] maw painted upon it. Khan's long carbon-[[Sleep/Legends|sleep]] made him jittery and prone to explosive bouts of rage if he was defied—a condition opposite that of most Seyugi, who trained to be patient and hide their emotions.
